title: Giant Ithorian snail
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Giant Ithorian snail''' was a [[Snail/Legends|snail]] native to the rainforests of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. It was a specialty of the [[Chef/Legends|chef]] at the [[Manarai]]. [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] enjoyed this dish. It was frequently cooked with [[flounut]] butter.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}}
